sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Trump's 50% tariffs: Textiles, jewellery, and seafood exports brace for a massive impact
feed.summary: Industry experts warn that the tariffs will hit India's labour-intensive export sectors - such as textiles, leather, jewellery, and marine products like shrimp - the hardest. These sectors, largely driven by MSMEs, may find it difficult to absorb the sudden cost shock.

feed.title: Trump Tariffs: India's Defining Moment
feed.summary: With the US accounting for nearly 18% of India's total exports, the proposed 50% tariff could deliver a severe blow, especially to small businesses. A sudden halt in exports would disrupt their cash flows, and for those who've borrowed from banks, repayment could quickly become a challenge.
